title: Lock & Lock Rectangular Storage Container - Clear, 2 Litre Airtight Food Storage Container, HPL819F
features: Four sided lockable lid which is 100% airtight & leak-proof
Perfect solution for Weetabix storage, spaghetti storage and more
Freezer safe microwave safe dishwasher safe (top rack only)
Made from BPA free plastic; easy to use and clean
External(l x w x d): 137 x 104 x 284 mm
description: From the manufacturer Main Features Airtight Watertight Dishwasher Safe Freezer Safe Microwave Safe Lock & Lock Food Storage Container Lock & Lock is a global living brand loved by over 100 countries worldwide. It is the first company to develop four-sided locking containers. With its unprecedented four-sided locking lids on its storage containers, Lock & Lock has expanded its product category to glass, tritan storage, water bottles, travel mugs and many more products for the home and everyday living. Along with its airtight and watertight features, Lock & Lock food storage containers are perfect for meal prepping, storing leftovers and packing lunches. Great Airtightness Hollow cylinder silicone seals and four-sided locking lids create extra secureness and exceptional airtightness compared to other brands. Excellent Durability With its patented technology of a 'blocking hole', Lock & Lock assures excellent durability that guarantees more than one million times of opening and closing. Space Efficiency Scientifically designed to easily stack horizontally and vertically, this product shows great space efficiency. Hygienic Raw Material Lock & Lock has raised their standard of safety and functionality using superior raw materials with durability and heat-resistance.
